DP.280.0002:
Whoops, sorry about that!
I was in a rush.\f
DP.280.0003:
Oh, wait a second...
Aren’t you...\f
You’re [0103,0001] from Twinleaf!
Wow, that brings back memories!\f
So, if you’re here, he can’t be far
behind...\f
This should be fun.
See you!\f
DP.280.0005:
[0103,0000]: What the...\f
Oh, hey, [0103,0001]!\f
You came to the Battle Tower too,
huh?\f
I decided I’ll see how I measure up
before going to Stark Mountain.\f
But that guy you were just talking
to...\f
...Nah, it’s all right!
I got here on my own power.\r
It won’t take long before I see him.\f
See ya, [0103,0001]!
I’m going to toughen up here!\f
DP.280.0006:
[0103,0000]: What the...\f
Oh, hey, [0103,0001]!\f
You came to the Battle Tower too,
huh?\f
I decided I’ll see how I measure up
for my quest to be the greatest!\f
But that guy you were just talking
to...\f
...Nah, it’s all right!
I got here on my own power.\r
It won’t take long before I see him.\f
See ya, [0103,0001]!
I’m going to toughen up here!\f
DP.280.0007:
Exchange Service Corner
A Cornucopia of Fabulous Prizes!
DP.280.0008:
Battle Tower
Gather, All Ye Greatest!
DP.280.0009:
In the Battle Rooms, the seventh
Trainer you face is the room’s boss.\f
You’ll need to stay focused if you
want to win!
DP.280.0010:
If you get a big win streak at the
Battle Tower, you get to battle\r
some real superstars.
DP.280.0011:
Mwahahaha! We earned a lot of BP
at the Battle Tower.\f
Now I can exchange them for
loads of prizes!
DP.280.0013:
I’m a babysitting Trainer!\f
I’m off to the Multi Battle Rooms
with my beloved son!
DP.280.0014:
I heard that the world’s best
gather here for battles.\f
This is my chance to get global
fame and recognition!
DP.280.0015:
The types of Pokémon!\f
The moves to be taught and used!\f
The items to be held!\f
To become number one here, there is 
no detail that can be overlooked!
DP.280.0016:
I’d love to hook up with a Beauty
for the Multi Battle Rooms.
